paper_title: Experimental Design to Limit Insects and Wind in Vernonia Pollination Study

methods.description: This method involves constructing protective fences around Vernonia plants to study the role of rainwater in pollen dispersal while preventing insect and wind interference.

steps.description: Four poles, each 3 m long, and higher than the Vernonia plant were placed at the four corners around the plant.
steps.searchable_summary: Place four 3 m poles around Vernonia plant

steps.description: The four walls were covered with plastic transparent paper while the roof was left open to rainfall.
steps.searchable_summary: Cover fence walls with transparent plastic, leave roof open

steps.description: Three distinct fences around three different plants were constructed for each of the two Vernonia spp.
steps.searchable_summary: Construct three fences for each Vernonia species

methods.description: This method involves isolating branches of Vernonia plants using webbed cones to prevent insect visits while allowing rainwater to reach the plants.

steps.description: A webbed cone was constructed using iron wires covered with impregnated mosquito net.
steps.searchable_summary: Construct webbed cone with iron wires and mosquito net

steps.description: An adhesive tape was used to hold the pointed end of the cone on the branch of Vernonia under study.
steps.searchable_summary: Attach webbed cone to Vernonia branch with adhesive tape

steps.description: Three different branches of the same plant were isolated with the webbed cones.
steps.searchable_summary: Isolate three branches of the same plant with webbed cones

methods.description: This method tests the germination of seeds obtained from field experiments to determine the influence of environmental agents on pollination.

steps.description: Seeds were put in envelopes, labeled, and conserved in the same non humid conditions.
steps.searchable_summary: Store seeds in labeled envelopes under non-humid conditions

steps.description: Germination test was done on the seeds obtained from field experiments in the laboratory of Biotechnology.
steps.searchable_summary: Conduct germination test on stored seeds in lab
